pr.title: Submission: OrthoInit + Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash (val_bpb: 1.1524)

output.summary: Orthogonal muP init, Muon tuning, Int6-mixed MLP expansion with SmearGate+BigramHash and FlashAttention 3 for 2048-token sliding eval.
techniques: Orthogonal + muP init with tuned Muon lr/momentum schedule and warmdown
Int6 mixed-precision MLP3x with SmearGate gating and BigramHash augmentations
FlashAttention 3 plus 2048-token sliding eval with NTK-aware RoPE
